name: 3x3 open grid canonical string hashes to a stable sha256
canon:
crossy-puzzle-digest/v1
dims=3x3
blocks=
circles=
shaded=
solution=C|A|T|A|R|E|T|E|A

name: a rebus canonical string hashes stably (multi-character cell preserved)

crossy-puzzle-digest/v1
dims=1x3
blocks=
circles=
shaded=

name: clues in the canon hash stably (across-then-down, ascending)
canon:
crossy-puzzle-digest/v1
dims=3x3
blocks=
circles=
shaded=
solution=C|A|T|A|R|E|T|E|A
clue=A:1:First across
clue=A:4:Second across
clue=D:1:First down
